qa_pairs.question: How can a user view the help section of an Apptainer container that was built from a Definition file?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can view the help section of an Apptainer container by running the command `apptainer run-help your-container-name.sif`, where `your-container-name.sif` is the name of the container file.

qa_pairs.question: If an Apptainer container has specific "apps" defined within it, how can a user get help for those individual apps?
qa_pairs.answer: To get help for a specific app defined within an Apptainer container, users should run `apptainer run-help --app appname your-container-name.sif`, replacing `appname` with the name of the app and `your-container-name.sif` with the container's filename.
